From: Zorroranch@aol.com
Subject: Travel
Date: Thu, 28 Feb 2008 20:30:38 GMT
To: DKIESQ@aol.com

Hi Darren, 
  What follows is a outline of what we were planning 
Sun March 2nd - Ranch to West Palm Beach
Wed March 5th - West Palm Beach to LSJ
Sat March 8th - LSJ to West Palm Beach
Mon March 10th - West Palm Beach to Ranch
 
As mentioned yesterday, if we were to travel from the Ranch to LSJ we would  
ask if we could fly business noting the length of flight
If you could let us know if you think this would work we would appreciate  it 
Warmest regards Karen
